ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for students in this school type */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for students in this school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2013-14) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "primary" REAL /* Percentage of primary school enrollment */,
  "primary_u_primary" REAL /* Percentage of upper primary school enrollment */,
  "for_entire_school" REAL /* Percentage of enrollment for entire school */,
  "u_primary" REAL /* Percentage of upper primary school enrollment */,
  "u_primary_sec_hr_sec" REAL /* Percentage of upper primary to secondary and higher secondary school enrollment */,
  "primary_u_primary_sec" REAL /* Percentage of primary to upper primary and secondary school enrollment */,
  "u_primary_sec" REAL /* Percentage of upper primary to secondary school enrollment */,
  "sec" REAL /* Percentage of secondary school enrollment */,
  "sec_hr_sec" REAL /* Percentage of secondary to higher secondary school enrollment */,
  "hr_sec" REAL /* Percentage of higher secondary school enrollment */,
  "all_schools" REAL /* Percentage of enrollment for all schools */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "male_students" INTEGER /* Number of male students */,
  "female_students" INTEGER /* Number of female students */,
  "teacher_student_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of teachers to students */,
  "average_class_size" INTEGER /* Average class size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, educator, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES education_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "male_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of male students enrolled */,
  "female_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of female students enrolled */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "total_classrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of classrooms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literacy_rates" (
  "literacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literacy rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate as a percentage */,
  "male_literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate for male students as a percentage */,
  "female_literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate for female students as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literacy_rates_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literacy_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literacy_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dropout_rates" (
  "dropout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dropout rate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate as a percentage */,
  "male_dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for male students as a percentage */,
  "female_dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for female students as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dropout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dropout_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dropout_rates_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dropout_rates_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "male_performance" REAL /* Performance metric value for male students */,
  "female_performance" REAL /* Performance metric value for female students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "num_schools" INTEGER /* Number of schools */,
  "num_classrooms" INTEGER /* Number of classrooms */,
  "num_toilets" INTEGER /* Number of toilets */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  "total_libraries" INTEGER /* Total number of libraries */,
  "total_computer_labs" INTEGER /* Total number of computer labs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_allocation" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Budget amount allocated */,
  "male_students_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for male students */,
  "female_students_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for female students */,
  "teacher_training_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for teacher training */,
  "infrastructure_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocation_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocation_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_allocation_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic year */,
  "expenditure_amount" REAL /* Expenditure amount */,
  "male_students_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on male students */,
  "female_students_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on female students */,
  "teacher_training_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on teacher training */,
  "infrastructure_expenditure" REAL /* Expenditure on infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
